sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65765" key="meiw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μει-ώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n65765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing diminution</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀστὴρ μ. τῶν προκτηθέντων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">N.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
